subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Omnipotent, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath created all things through His blessed and goodly Word that shineth forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقتدر قیومی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع آفرینش را بکلمه طیبه مبارکه که از افق
subcodes.subjects: @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @call to action, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
